Bob Smith is a 42-year-old senior software engineer at TechNova Inc, a fintech startup headquartered in Manhattan, New York.
Alice Chen is Bob's wife and works as a lead data scientist at Columbia University's AI Research Lab in New York.
Bob and Alice have two children: Charlie, age 12, who attends Greenfield Academy, and Diana, age 8, who attends the same school.
TechNova Inc was founded in 2018 by CEO Maria Rodriguez and CTO James Park, and has raised $50 million in Series B funding from Sequoia Capital.
Bob previously worked at Google in Mountain View, California for 6 years before joining TechNova Inc in 2021.
Alice completed her PhD in Machine Learning at MIT in Cambridge, Massachusetts under the supervision of Professor David Li.
Bob and Alice live in a brownstone apartment in Brooklyn, New York, which they purchased in 2019.
Charlie plays on the Greenfield Academy soccer team and takes piano lessons from instructor Elena Vasquez every Saturday.
Diana is passionate about robotics and participates in the FIRST Lego League competition organized by Brooklyn STEM Center.
Bob's mother, Patricia Smith, is a retired nurse who lives in Austin, Texas with Bob's father, Robert Smith Sr., a retired high school teacher.
Alice's parents, Wei Chen and Mei Lin Chen, immigrated from Shanghai, China and now run a restaurant called Golden Dragon in Flushing, Queens.
TechNova Inc's main product is PayFlow, a real-time payment processing platform used by over 200 banks across North America.
James Park previously co-founded a blockchain startup called ChainLink Labs, which was acquired by Stripe in 2017.
Maria Rodriguez serves on the board of directors of Women in Tech Foundation and mentors startups at Y Combinator.
Bob volunteers as a coding instructor at Code.org's Brooklyn chapter every Sunday, teaching Python to underprivileged high school students.
Alice published a landmark paper on graph neural networks in Nature Machine Intelligence in 2023, co-authored with Professor David Li and researcher Yuki Tanaka from Tokyo University.
The Smith family vacations annually at Lake Placid in the Adirondacks, where Bob's college friend Kevin O'Brien owns a lakeside cabin.
Bob earned his Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from Stanford University in 2006 and his Master's from Carnegie Mellon University in 2008.
TechNova Inc recently partnered with JPMorgan Chase and Goldman Sachs to expand PayFlow into the European market through their London offices.
Alice is currently leading a joint research project with OpenAI and DeepMind on large language model interpretability, funded by a $2 million NSF grant.
